evals.prompt: Create the scenes file for a Blog section. Provider is `my_drupal_theme`. The data model has node.article (composition: structured) with fields: title (string), field_body (text), field_image (reference to media.image). I need two scenes: one Blog Detail page showing a single article in full view mode, and one Blog Listing page showing multiple articles. Output as YAML to sections/blog/blog.section.scenes.yml
evals.expected_output: A valid YAML file with two scenes. The Detail scene uses 'entity: node.article, view_mode: full'. The Listing scene uses 'entity: view.recent_articles' — NOT 'records: [0,1,2]'. All component values use 'my_drupal_theme:component' format. Both scenes use 'type: scene, ref: design-system:shell' to inherit the shell.

assertions.name: listing-uses-view-entity
assertions.description: The Listing scene uses 'entity: view.*' not 'records: []'

assertions.name: no-records-shorthand-for-listing
assertions.description: No 'records:' key appears in a listing scene context

assertions.name: shell-ref-present
assertions.description: Both scenes use 'type: scene' and 'ref: design-system:shell'

assertions.name: no-type-element
assertions.description: No 'type: element' nodes appear in the output

evals.prompt: Create the JSONata view mode mapping for node.article.teaser. Provider: my_drupal_theme. Fields from the data model: title (string), field_body (text), field_image (reference to media.image, has .url and .alt), field_category (reference to taxonomy_term.category, has .name). Output the JSONata expression.
evals.expected_output: A valid JSONata array expression that maps the entity fields to ComponentNode[]. title maps to a heading component. field_body maps to a text-block. field_image maps to a figure with src and alt. field_category optionally maps to a badge. Uses dot notation for nested fields. Does NOT use provider prefix in component names (provider is added at render time).

assertions.name: jsonata-is-array-expression
assertions.description: The expression returns an array (starts with '[' or wraps in array)

assertions.name: title-maps-to-heading
assertions.description: title field is mapped to a heading component

assertions.name: nested-field-dot-notation
assertions.description: Nested fields use dot notation: field_image.url, field_image.alt

assertions.name: conditional-for-optional-fields
assertions.description: Optional reference fields use conditional: field ? {...} pattern

evals.prompt: Create the compose mapping for view.recent_articles (a view entity). It should show a listing of articles in teaser view mode using a wrapper component 'my_drupal_theme:article-list' with an 'items' slot containing 3 article entity refs. Output the JSONata file for view-modes/view.recent_articles.default.jsonata
evals.expected_output: A JSONata expression that receives {} as input (no entity record). Returns a single object (not array) with component 'my_drupal_theme:article-list' and a slots.items array containing 3 type:entity nodes for node.article with view_mode:teaser and record 0,1,2.

assertions.name: single-object-not-array
assertions.description: The expression returns a single object (wrapper component), not an array

assertions.name: entity-refs-in-slots
assertions.description: The items slot contains type:entity nodes for node.article

assertions.name: no-field-access
assertions.description: No field variable access ($ is not used) since input is {}
